what_it_does: Stores YAML-frontmatter metadata for a channel-memory image attachment, linking it to an image asset URI.
observations: Only YAML frontmatter is present; no body content
standouts: Uses a custom image:// URI scheme to reference the asset
Attachment is categorized under design-source / capital-raise / p-26
concerns: No caption, alt text, or content description for the image
Target URI resolution mechanism is not defined here
notes: A bare attachment index entry that points an image asset to a design-source channel memory item.
questions: What visual or semantic content does image p-26 contain?
How is the image:// URI resolved to an actual file or resource?
Is there a corresponding channel memory entry that references this attachment?
purpose_vs_actual: Stated purpose matches: it records an image attachment reference for a channel memory entry.
intention_signals: To create a durable, timestamped link between an image asset and a channel memory entry so it can be retrieved in context.
contribution: Provides a persistent, typed attachment reference that connects an image asset URI to a channel memory entry with a creation timestamp.
summary_for_embedding: A YAML metadata file recording an image attachment (att-e7d03755) in the design-source channel that points to image://design-source/capital-raise/p-26.
intention_for_embedding: To catalog and link an image asset to a channel memory entry for retrieval and contextual association.
